description.para: The following constants define the interrupt types that can be set for each GPIO pin.

briefdescription.para: Interrupt on Rising edge.
Interrupt Falling edge.
Interrupt on both edges.
Interrupt on high level.
Interrupt on low level.
by using protection macros
Max pins in a GPIO bank.
GPIO Bank 0.
GPIO Bank 1.
GPIO Bank 2.
GPIO Bank 3.
GPIO Bank 4.
GPIO Bank 5.
Max banks in a Zynq Ultrascale+ MP GPIO device.
Max banks in a Zynq GPIO device.
Max banks number of all platforms.
Max pins in the Zynq Ultrascale+ MP GPIO device 0 - 25, Bank 0 26 - 51, Bank 1 52 - 77, Bank 2 78 - 109, Bank 3 110 - 141, Bank 4 142 - 173, Bank 5.
Max pins in the Zynq GPIO device 0 - 31, Bank 0 32 - 53, Bank 1 54 - 85, Bank 2 86 - 117, Bank 3.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* XGpioPs_Handler)(void *CallBackRef, u32 Bank, u32 Status)
memberdef.name: XGpioPs_Handler

briefdescription.para: This handler data type allows the user to define a callback function to handle the interrupts for the GPIO device.

detaileddescription.para: The application using this driver is expected to define a handler of this type, to support interrupt driven mode. The handler executes in an interrupt context such that minimal processing should be performed.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions for a GPIO bank. It is passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked. Its type is not important to the driver component, so it is a void pointer.
is the bank for which the interrupt status has changed.
is the Interrupt status of the GPIO bank.

briefdescription.para: This table contains configuration information for each GPIO device in the system.
This function initializes a XGpioPs instance/driver.

detaileddescription.para: All members of the XGpioPs instance structure are initialized and StubHandlers are assigned to the Bank Status Handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
points to the XGpioPs device configuration structure.

is the device base address in the virtual memory address space. If the address translation is not used then the physical address should be passed. Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

briefdescription.para: Read the Data register of the specified GPIO bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.

simplesect.para: Current value of the Data register.
This function is used for reading the state of all the GPIO pins of specified bank.

briefdescription.para: Write to the Data register of the specified GPIO bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the value to be written to the Data register.

simplesect.para: This function is used for writing to all the GPIO pins of the bank. The previous state of the pins is not maintained.

briefdescription.para: Set the Direction of the pins of the specified GPIO Bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the 32 bit mask of the Pin direction to be set for all the pins in the Bank. Bits with 0 are set to Input mode, bits with 1 are set to Output Mode.

simplesect.para: This function is used for setting the direction of all the pins in the specified bank. The previous state of the pins is not maintained.

briefdescription.para: Get the Direction of the pins of the specified GPIO Bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.

simplesect.para: Returns a 32 bit mask of the Direction register. Bits with 0 are in Input mode, bits with 1 are in Output Mode.

briefdescription.para: Set the Output Enable of the pins of the specified GPIO Bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the 32 bit mask of the Output Enables to be set for all the pins in the Bank. The Output Enable of bits with 0 are disabled, the Output Enable of bits with 1 are enabled.

simplesect.para: This function is used for setting the Output Enables of all the pins in the specified bank. The previous state of the Output Enables is not maintained.

briefdescription.para: Get the Output Enable status of the pins of the specified GPIO Bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.

simplesect.para: Returns a a 32 bit mask of the Output Enable register. Bits with 0 are in Disabled state, bits with 1 are in Enabled State.

briefdescription.para: Get the Bank number and the Pin number in the Bank, for the given PinNumber in the GPIO device.

parameterdescription.para: is the Pin number in the GPIO device.
returns the Bank in which this GPIO pin is present. Valid values are 0 to XGPIOPS_MAX_BANKS - 1.
returns the Pin Number within the Bank.

briefdescription.para: Read Data from the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the data has to be read.

simplesect.para: Current value of the Pin (0 or 1).
This function is used for reading the state of the specified GPIO pin.

briefdescription.para: Write data to the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number to which the Data is to be written.
is the data to be written to the specified pin (0 or 1).

simplesect.para: This function does a masked write to the specified pin of the specified GPIO bank. The previous state of other pins is maintained.

briefdescription.para: Set the Direction of the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number to which the Data is to be written.
is the direction to be set for the specified pin. Valid values are 0 for Input Direction, 1 for Output Direction.

briefdescription.para: Get the Direction of the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the Direction is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para:
Direction of the specified pin.
0 for Input Direction
1 for Output Direction

briefdescription.para: Set the Output Enable of the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number to which the Data is to be written.
specifies whether the Output Enable for the specified pin should be enabled. Valid values are 0 for Disabling Output Enable, 1 for Enabling Output Enable.

briefdescription.para: Get the Output Enable status of the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the Output Enable status is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para:
Output Enable of the specified pin.
0 if Output Enable is disabled for this pin
1 if Output Enable is enabled for this pin

briefdescription.para: This function runs a self-test on the GPIO driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: This function does a register read/write test on some of the Interrupt Registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if the self-test passed.
XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the interrupts for the specified pins in the specified bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the bit mask of the pins for which interrupts are to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the interrupts for the specified pins in the specified bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the bit mask of the pins for which interrupts are to be disabled. Bit positions of 1 will be disabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the interrupt enable status for a bank.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.

simplesect.para: Enabled interrupt(s) in a 32-bit format. Bit positions with 1 indicate that the interrupt for that pin is enabled, bit positions with 0 indicate that the interrupt for that pin is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function returns interrupt status read from Interrupt Status Register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.

simplesect.para: The value read from Interrupt Status Register.

briefdescription.para: This function clears pending interrupt(s) with the provided mask.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called after the software has serviced the interrupts that are pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the mask of the interrupts to be cleared. Bit positions of 1 will be cleared. Bit positions of 0 will not change the previous interrupt status.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XGpioPs *InstancePtr, u8 Bank, u32 IntrType, u32 IntrPolarity, u32 IntrOnAny)
memberdef.name: XGpioPs_SetIntrType

briefdescription.para: This function is used for setting the Interrupt Type, Interrupt Polarity and Interrupt On Any for the specified GPIO Bank pins.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
is the 32 bit mask of the interrupt type. 0 means Level Sensitive and 1 means Edge Sensitive.
is the 32 bit mask of the interrupt polarity. 0 means Active Low or Falling Edge and 1 means Active High or Rising Edge.
is the 32 bit mask of the interrupt trigger for edge triggered interrupts. 0 means trigger on single edge using the configured interrupt polarity and 1 means trigger on both edges.

simplesect.para: This function is used for setting the interrupt related properties of all the pins in the specified bank. The previous state of the pins is not maintained. To change the Interrupt properties of a single GPIO pin, use the function XGpioPs_SetPinIntrType().

memberdef.argsstring: (const XGpioPs *InstancePtr, u8 Bank, u32 *IntrType, u32 *IntrPolarity, u32 *IntrOnAny)
memberdef.name: XGpioPs_GetIntrType

briefdescription.para: This function is used for getting the Interrupt Type, Interrupt Polarity and Interrupt On Any for the specified GPIO Bank pins.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an XGpioPs instance.
is the bank number of the GPIO to operate on.
returns the 32 bit mask of the interrupt type. 0 means Level Sensitive and 1 means Edge Sensitive.
returns the 32 bit mask of the interrupt polarity. 0 means Active Low or Falling Edge and 1 means Active High or Rising Edge.
returns the 32 bit mask of the interrupt trigger for edge triggered interrupts. 0 means trigger on single edge using the configured interrupt polarity and 1 means trigger on both edges.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the status callback function.

detaileddescription.para: The callback function is called by the XGpioPs_IntrHandler when an interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the upper layer callback reference passed back when the callback function is invoked.
is the pointer to the callback function.

simplesect.para: The handler is called within interrupt context, so it should do its work quickly and queue potentially time-consuming work to a task-level thread.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for GPIO interrupts.It checks the interrupt status registers of all the banks to determine the actual bank in which an interrupt has been triggered.

detaileddescription.para: It then calls the upper layer callback handler set by the function XGpioPs_SetBankHandler(). The callback is called when an interrupt

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.

simplesect.para: This function does not save and restore the processor context such that the user must provide this processing.

briefdescription.para: This function is used for setting the IRQ Type of a single GPIO pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number whose IRQ type is to be set.
is the IRQ type for GPIO Pin. Use XGPIOPS_IRQ_TYPE_* defined in xgpiops.h to specify the IRQ type.

inbodydescription.para: < Default statement is added for MISRA C compliance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the IRQ Type of a given GPIO pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to an XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number whose IRQ type is to be obtained.

simplesect.para: Use XGPIOPS_IRQ_TYPE_* defined in xgpiops.h for the IRQ type returned by this function.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the interrupt for the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the interrupt is to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the interrupts for the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the interrupt is to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function returns whether interrupts are enabled for the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the interrupt enable status is to be known.

listitem.para: TRUE if the interrupt is enabled.
FALSE if the interrupt is disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function returns interrupt enable status of the specified pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the interrupt enable status is to be known.

listitem.para: TRUE if the interrupt has occurred.
FALSE if the interrupt has not occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the specified pending interrupt.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called after the software has serviced the interrupts that are pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XGpioPs instance.
is the pin number for which the interrupt status is to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XGpioPs_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xgpiops.h for the definition of XGpioPs_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.
